stories.title: Cerundolo Wins Queen's Club — First Argentine Champion, Longest Final in History

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Francisco Cerundolo def. Tommy Paul 6-7(4), 6-4, 6-3 to win Queen's Club.

3h03m — longest final in tournament history. First Argentine champion ever. 5th career title. 🎾 #QueensClub2026 #HSBC [URL]

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Cerundolo ended Tommy Paul's 9-match Queen's Club winning streak.

First ATP 500 title. 2nd grass title (Eastbourne 2023 was the first). Paul's Wimbledon prep still solid — he'll be seeded. 🎾 #QueensClub2026 #Wimbledon2026 [URL]

article.headline: Cerundolo Makes History at Queen's Club — First Argentine Champion After Longest Final Ever

stories.title: Noskova Wins Berlin WTA 500 — First Grass Title, Top 10 Debut

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Linda Noskova def. Pegula 6-4, 4-6, 6-3 to win Berlin WTA 500.

At 21, she breaks into the Top 10 for the first time and becomes the new Czech No. 1. First grass title. 🎾 #Berlin2026 #WTA [URL]

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Czech women won BOTH grass-court WTA titles this weekend.

Noskova in Berlin. Bouzkova in Nottingham.

Two titles. Two firsts on grass. Wimbledon is going to be very interesting. 🎾 #WTA #Wimbledon2026 [URL]

article.headline: Noskova Claims Berlin Title and Breaks Into the Top 10 — Czech No. 1 at Age 21

stories.title: Bouzkova Wins Nottingham — First Grass Title, Longest WTA Match of 2026

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Marie Bouzkova def. Navarro 7-6(5), 4-6, 6-2 in Nottingham — longest WTA match of 2026 at 2h57m.

4th career title. First on grass. Career-high No. 22. 🎾 #Nottingham2026 #WTA [URL]

article.headline: Bouzkova Grinds Out Nottingham Title — First Grass Crown in 2026's Longest WTA Match

stories.title: Wimbledon 2026 Seedings Set — Sinner No. 1, Six Americans, Alcaraz Out

x_posts.label: Post 4-1
x_posts.text:
Wimbledon 2026 men's seeds (rankings cutoff today):

No. 1 Sinner
No. 2 Zverev
No. 3 FAA
No. 4 Shelton
No. 5 de Minaur
No. 6 Fritz
No. 7 Djokovic
No. 8 Medvedev

Six Americans. No Alcaraz. 🎾 #Wimbledon2026 [URL]

x_posts.label: Post 4-2
x_posts.text:
Wimbledon 2026 women's seeds: Sabalenka No. 1 (has never won it), Rybakina No. 2, defending champion Swiatek No. 3, Andreeva No. 5.

Alcaraz is out. The men's bracket is wide open. 🎾 #Wimbledon2026 #WTA [URL]

stories.title: Wimbledon Qualifying Underway at Roehampton — Day 1

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Wimbledon qualifying is live at Roehampton.

256 players. 32 spots. 3 rounds. ESPN+ exclusive.

Draw ceremony June 26. Championships June 29. Sinner defends. Alcaraz is out. 🎾 #Wimbledon2026 #Tennis [URL]
